name: apyUSD
redeem: apyUSD is an ERC-4626 vault share for apxUSD. Deposits are permissionless and immediate, but exits are not instant: redeeming burns apyUSD for non-transferable apxUSD_unlock, then users wait about 20 days before claiming apxUSD; multiple unlocks reset the cooldown. Secondary-market exit may be available through DEX liquidity.
notes: Yield-bearing wrapper around apxUSD, whose backing is offchain DAT preferred shares. Official docs state no KYB/KYC requirement for the vault, but frontend access is restricted in some jurisdictions. Contract is upgradeable and includes pause, denylist, fee, vesting, and unlock-token controls.
